steps.t: Anborn can be found at Haerondir in the Wastes. You have defeated Burudagath the Bloodletter and should now bring tidings of victory to Anborn.
Faramir can be found near Anborn at Haerondir in the Wastes. Faramir has suddenly appeared at your side at Haerondir. You should speak to him and lear…
Anborn can be found at Haerondir. Faramir, son of Ondoher has come to the old ruins of Haerondir and intends to aid the Rangers in maintaining the ill…
